data.title: US Credit Card Debt Shatters $1,280,000,000,000 As Goldman Sachs Warns Americans Facing ‘Affordability Problem’
data.description:
US credit card debt is mounting as banking giant Goldman Sachs warns Americans are facing an affordability crisis. New data from the Federal Reserve Bank of New York shows American credit card debt increased by $44 billion in the fourth quarter of 2025, hitting $1. 28 trillion
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2026/02/14/us-credit-card-debt-shatters-1280000000000-as-goldman-sachs-warns-americans-facing-affordability-problem/

data.title: ARK turns bullish on Coinbase again with $15M purchase after selling spree
data.description:
Cathie Wood’s ARK Invest added nearly $15. 2 million in Coinbase stock across three ETFs, reversing course days after offloading more than $39 million in shares.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/ark-invest-buys-coinbase-15m-after-selling?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: STOCKS | JM Financial Predicts Limited Upside for HDFC Bank Amid Sector Challenges
data.description: JM Financial has projected a cautious outlook for HDFC Bank's stock in the near term, expecting it to trade between Rs 900 and Rs 970 with limited potential for gains. According to NS3.AI, the brokerage advises holding the stock with a stop loss set at Rs 895, considering the broader market dynamics. The Nifty 50 index is anticipated to encounter resistance at 26,000. Sector-specific challenges, such as stronger loan growth by public sector banks and margin pressures on private banks like HDFC, contribute to this conservative guidance.

data.title: Brewdog Plc Considers Sale with AlixPartners' Guidance
data.description: Brewdog Plc, known for its craft beers like Punk IPA and Elvis Juice, is exploring a potential sale. Bloomberg posted on X that the British brewer has enlisted AlixPartners to manage the process. The decision comes amid a competitive market environment, prompting Brewdog to evaluate strategic options. The company has gained popularity for its distinctive beer offerings and innovative marketing strategies. As Brewdog navigates this potential transition, industry observers are keenly watching for further developments.

data.title: ARK Invest has purchased approximately $15 million worth of Coinbase stock, ending its previous reduction in holdings.
data.description: ARK Invest disclosed that it has renewed its holdings of Coinbase stock, purchasing approximately 93,000 shares, worth about $15.2 million, through three ETFs: ARKK, ARKW, and ARKF. This comes after ARK had previously sold over $39 million worth of Coinbase stock in the preceding days. Driven by the market rebound, Coinbase's stock price rose approximately 16% to $164.32 that day. Coinbase previously announced a net loss of $667 million for the fourth quarter of 2025, ending eight consecutive quarters of profitability. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: US Treasury Secretary Links CLARITY Bill to Potential Crypto Market Recovery
data.description:
US Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent said passing the CLARITY crypto market structure bill could boost market confidence during the downturn.

The post US Treasury Secretary Links CLARITY Bill to Potential Crypto Market Recovery first appeared on Ecoinimist.

source: https://ecoinimist.com/2026/02/14/us-treasury-predict-clarity-bill-rebound/?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=us-treasury-predict-clarity-bill-rebound

data.title: GEOPOLITICS | Qatar Urges Political Solutions Amid Regional Tensions
data.description: On February 14, Qatar's Foreign Ministry spokesperson, Majid Ansari, expressed opposition to regional military escalation, urging all parties to prioritize political solutions. According to Jin10, Ansari made these remarks while attending the Munich Security Conference in Germany. He highlighted that the Gulf region is at a critical juncture, and countries should focus on maintaining peace rather than escalating conflicts. Ansari called on the international community to uphold and strengthen existing mediation channels instead of weakening them. He emphasized that despite the pressures and challenges faced by the mediation process, dialogue remains the only viable path to ending conflicts.

data.title: Bitcoin Shorts Crowd In as Funding Hits 2024 Lows
data.description:
The 14-day simple moving average of Bitcoin funding rates has dropped to -0. 002, its lowest reading since September 2024 and below the trough seen in May 2025. At the same time, Bitcoin continues a gradual downtrend, trading near $66,400
source: https://www.ethnews.com/bitcoin-shorts-crowd-in-as-funding-hits-2024-lows/

data.title: STOCKS | Aaron's Company Stock Rallies After Earnings Beat
data.description: Aaron's Company stock saw a significant increase this week after the company reported earnings that surpassed expectations, driven by better cost management and stable credit trends. According to NS3.AI, despite this positive development, the stock is still down between 35% and 45% for the year. Analysts maintain a cautious outlook, predominantly issuing Hold ratings. The company's future performance will largely hinge on macroeconomic conditions impacting lower-income consumers and the successful implementation of its digital strategies.

data.title: X to Introduce Crypto and Stock Trading on Timeline Soon
data.description: Crypto Rover posted on X that the social media platform is set to launch a new feature allowing users to trade cryptocurrencies and stocks directly from their timelines. This development is expected to be implemented within a few weeks, marking a significant step in integrating financial services into social media platforms. The move aims to enhance user engagement by providing seamless access to trading activities without leaving the app. Further details on the specific functionalities and supported assets are anticipated as the launch date approaches.

data.title: Bitcoin Approaches Key Resistance Zone After Surpassing $69,000
data.description: Crypto KOL Ted posted on X that Bitcoin (BTC) has recently surged past the $69,000 mark and is now nearing a significant resistance zone. The cryptocurrency's ability to reclaim the $70,000-$72,000 range is crucial, as it would position BTC above the average purchase price of prominent investor Michael Saylor. However, if Bitcoin faces rejection at this level, it is likely to retest the $64,000-$66,000 zone.

data.title: GEOPOLITICS | UK Prime Minister Stamer Reaffirms Commitment to NATO Article 5
data.description: UK Prime Minister Stamer has reiterated the country's unwavering commitment to NATO's Article 5. According to Jin10, Stamer emphasized that there is no doubt about the UK's readiness to assist if called upon today. This statement underscores the UK's dedication to collective defense within the NATO alliance.
